# ValueGreaterThanMaxNumberError

**Class**

An error a validator emits when a given value is greater than the allowed maximum.

## Declaration

```swift
interface ValueGreaterThanMaxNumberError
```

## Overview

Extends `ValueRangeError`.

## Instance Properties

- **maximum**: The maximum value (inclusive) for the tested length property.

## Value Range Errors

- **ValueRangeError**: The base class of range-related validation errors.
- **ValueLessThanMinNumberError**: An error a validator emits when a given value is less than the allowed minimum.
- **ValueNotInNumberRangeError**: An error a validator emits when a value can’t be represented by a JavaScript number due to being outside of the representable range.

## Inherited By

- ValueRangeError
